author: Sample Founder
postText: I do not need an AI agent to build the whole product. I need it to make the next annoying fix less expensive to start.
fullContext: Example manual seed. The post is a founder-level workflow observation, not a technical agent benchmark. Good fit for Arun because it is about reducing execution drag without pretending the model replaces judgment.
threadContext: Comments are about where agents actually save time: small bugs, copy changes, internal tools, and first drafts.
observedAudience: Founders, indie hackers, operators using AI coding agents
whyItMightMatter: Good fit for Arun's workflow framing: shorter loop from problem to tested fix.

author: Sample Newsletter Writer
postText: Everyone says Notes is for conversation, then immediately uses it like a smaller, sadder billboard.
fullContext: Example manual seed. This is a platform-behavior observation with a dry comic angle. Strong fit for The Model Citizen.
threadContext: Thread is discussing whether Notes works better for replies, quotes, or reposting polished essays.
observedAudience: Newsletter writers, media operators, founders building audience
whyItMightMatter: Useful for Conversation Scout positioning and The Model Citizen's dry distribution commentary.
